title: centaurea × victorii
intro: Centaurea × victorii, also known as Cornflower or Bachelor's Button, is a hybrid perennial flower that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Centaurea × victorii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Centaurea × victorii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
